name: Intune Reporting
description: Entra ID Groups Inspector is a Log Analytics dashboard that tracks changes to Azure Entra (Azure AD) groups, including creations, deletions, and membership edits. It surfaces audit-log data with built-in visuals, time filters, and export options for security and compliance workflows. Designed for Intune and Entra ID environments, it helps admins quickly validate group governance and access changes.
author: Damien VAN ROBAEYS

securityCheck.aiSummary: The Intune Reporting tooling contains legitimate telemetry and Azure AD permission management patterns. Key concerns include data exfiltration risk through Log Analytics telemetry, hardcoded/secrets handling practices, potential XML processing risks, and a substantive privilege-assignment flow that could enable broader Graph access. Recommendations center on tightening data minimization and opt-in for telemetry, securing credentials (Key Vault/Managed Identity), validating external XML, and enforcing least-privilege and robust change control for permission changes.
